page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.8xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 32 dedicated physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, providing 32 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates that the instance exhibits average multi-core performance but weaker single-core capabilities. In stress-ng and Geekbench testing, single-core CPU performance falls into the bottom 25%, and single-threaded gzip compression is in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core benchmarks, including Geekbench multi-core, Passmark CPU, and bzip3 multi-threaded decompression, consistently rank in the middle 50%. Memory bandwidth tests for both cached small blocks and uncached large blocks also demonstrate average performance.

Given its high memory capacity of 256.0 GB relative to its 32 vCPUs, the ecs.se1.8xlarge is structured for memory-intensive workloads. It achieves average throughput in Redis SET operations and database operations, making it suitable for in-memory caching, database hosting, and multi-threaded data processing. Qualitatively, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density provide stable resource availability for memory-bound applications, though workloads requiring high single-threaded compute performance may experience limitations due to the lower single-core benchmark results.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.8xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show a contrast between weak single-core execution (ranking in the bottom 25% for single-core stress-ng and Geekbench tests) and average multi-core capabilities, with Passmark CPU, Geekbench multi-core, and Redis SET operations all placing in the middle 50%. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive, multi-threaded workloads such as database operations, in-memory caching, and general-purpose data processing where high single-thread performance is not the primary requirement.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.8xlarge is a memory-optimized server with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256.0 GB of RAM, and 6 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering average multi-core and database performance.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.8xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256.0 GB of RAM, and KVM virtualization.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated processors and balanced multi-core performance for memory-intensive database and caching workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM
KVM hypervisor with 6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Average multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Best suited for databases, in-memory caching, and multi-threaded workloads
